---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Propose a new structural component, route, or database model.
title: '[FEATURE]: '
labels: 'type: feature'
assignees: ''
---

## Target Workspace
- [ ] `app: client` (Client Portal)
- [ ] `app: vet-dash` (Vet Dashboard)
- [ ] `app: admin` (Admin/Management)
- [ ] `pkg: database` (Prisma/Supabase Schema)
- [ ] `pkg: ui` (Shared Design System)

## Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem or a structural expansion? Please describe.

## Proposed Solution
A clear, concise description of what you want to build and how it integrates into the existing monorepo ecosystem.

## Architectural Impact
Will this require database schema updates (`prisma migrate`), new API endpoints, or shared component tokens?
